title: 30th anniversary short spoiler free thread
wikitext:
[]: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 7:46 am Hey guys I'm trying to stay spoiler free Does anyone know if reports that the short will "never be online officially" are true?

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Feb 22, 2026 7:58 am I don't expect this thread to get much activity, but I thought it was important to create it anyway for people who want to remain spoiler-free, so I brought the Kuribo post here. @Kuribo to be honest, I have no idea. I hope not!

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 8:00 am Thank you :) This is the post I saw that makes this claim: https://www.instagram.com/p/DVD26zzEVlR/?igsh=MW4waWtwYnA0c2g0bA==

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sun Feb 22, 2026 8:51 am Current reports are extrapolations of old wording. It's exclusive to the event (until it isn't). No one knows really.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 9:51 am Szmitten wrote: Current reports are extrapolations of old wording. It's exclusive to the event (until it isn't). No one knows really.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Feb 22, 2026 12:21 pm I was talking to RussianRiz about this and we came to the conclusion that there might be a possibility that the short film will never be released overseas, especially since this isn't so uncommon in Japan (he gave the example of Studio Ghibli, which has several short films that are only available in their museum). However, Evangelion is a more corporate franchise. So I imagine that at some point the short might be released (perhaps in a Blu-ray collection or to promote some other project). We will have to wait ans see.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 12:43 pm Well with the Ghibli shorts the thing is you can go to the museum at sny point. This Eva event is a limited thing. Anno I think also just wants people to see his stuff usually. I'll try to be patient and opt for camrip when I lose hope.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Feb 22, 2026 1:30 pm If it doesn't end up on YouTube, I imagine it will end up in some inevitable re-release collection for the next anniversary. So basically let's wait for 2035 and take care of ourself.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Feb 22, 2026 1:46 pm Perhaps. I think the short also has a lot of merchandising potential, mainly because Asuka is the most popular character right now. There are at least two figures I can see they selling.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Feb 22, 2026 2:41 pm Joseki wrote: If it doesn't end up on YouTube, I imagine it will end up in some inevitable re-release collection for the next anniversary. So basically let's wait for 2035 and take care of ourself.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 2:55 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Alas, according to the post on r/eva, it's happening again in April. They'll probably show everything again and the only new info is whatever Anno & co might say this time.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Feb 22, 2026 2:58 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: not sure we should post it here

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by blue » Sun Feb 22, 2026 4:15 pm kuribo-04 wrote: i'm trying to stay spoiler free

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 23, 2026 1:30 am blue wrote: i couldn't resist and watched the camrip... so i envy you and sincerely wish you plenty of patience and self-control! :) Thank you. :D But I honestly dont know how much longer I should wait... Those options you listed for how the short might be released in the future all make sense. I thought of a bluray too.

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 23, 2026 1:46 am blue wrote: i couldn't resist and watched the camrip... so i envy you and sincerely wish you plenty of patience and self-control! :)

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by blue » Mon Feb 23, 2026 2:33 am kuribo-04 wrote: I honestly don't know how much longer I should wait...

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 23, 2026 2:43 am That sounds good but also like it might take months and months ;_;

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Feb 23, 2026 10:30 am kuribo-04 wrote: months and months

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Feb 23, 2026 10:51 am kuribo-04 wrote: That sounds good but also like it might take months and months

[]: Re: 30th anniversary short (spoiler free thread)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 23, 2026 9:56 pm BernardoCairo wrote: kuribo-04#946225 wrote: That sounds good but also like it might take months and months ;_;
